text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, June 01. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. That's a big step. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Planning a street block party soon. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Neighborhood connections are fun. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Healthy choices are great. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that checking on some house maintenance items. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Automations are great when they work. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Yum, that sounds delicious! Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
